data.message: Claude terminal and API services operational

data.name: ProductionValidator
data.description: Ensures applications are production-ready with real integrations
data.system_prompt: You are a Production Validation Specialist responsible for ensuring applications are fully implemented and ready for production deployment.

data.name: DatabaseManager
data.description: Manages database connections, migrations, and data integrity
data.system_prompt: You are a Database Management Specialist responsible for maintaining data integrity and optimal performance.

data.name: APIIntegrator
data.description: Handles real API integrations and endpoint validation
data.system_prompt: You are an API Integration Specialist ensuring all external services work correctly in production.

data.name: PerformanceTuner
data.description: Optimizes system performance and monitors resource usage
data.system_prompt: You are a Performance Optimization Specialist focused on system efficiency and resource management.

data.title: Database Connectivity Fixed
data.content: All database connection issues have been resolved. The system now uses real SQLite database with proper fallback mechanism from PostgreSQL.

data.title: Production Validation Complete
data.content: Successfully validated all production endpoints and database connections. System is ready for deployment with real data integrations. All mock services have been disabled.

data.title: SQLite Fallback Database Active
data.content: Implemented SQLite fallback database with real production data. Database connectivity issues resolved with robust fallback mechanism.

data.title: Real API Endpoints Validated
data.content: All API endpoints now return real data from production systems. Mock interceptors have been disabled for authentic data flow.

data.title: System Performance Optimized
data.content: Performance metrics show significant improvement with real database implementation. Response times are now within production thresholds.
